title:
Help influence the direction of data.govt.nz
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Help influence the direction of data.govt.nz
Data.govt.nz is being reshaped to make it more useful – and we’d like your input.
The site is being enhanced to be the go-to site for all things data. In addition to the existing data catalogue, it’ll include guidance, advice, knowledge, expertise, events and news.

## It only takes 10 minutes
Tell us how to organise the site so you can find what you’re looking for by completing our short confidential online card sort exercise .
https://72z4k6e8.optimalworkshop.com/optimalsort/wy6760o7
Led by Stats NZ , the card sort is open until 9am on Monday 11 June 2018.

## Up next: testers needed
When data.govt.nz's new structure is sorted, we’ll put out the call for testers to make sure we got it right.

## Stats NZ's contribution to managing NZ's data
The SSC designated Stats NZ as the lead agency for New Zealand’s data in 2017, appointing its Chief Executive to the role of Government Chief Data Steward (GCDS).
The GCDS is responsible for developing the infrastructure and capability to ensure the government stewards data as a national strategic asset. The objective is to gain more value from data and innovation.
